title: Music Manager
description: A mod that allows you to see the current minecraft track playing and set any track you like to start playing.
body:
## Description
This mod allows the player to see what music is currently playing by checking the f3 menu. I added this so that if you ever really like a minecraft track you can simply hit f3 and find out whats playing.

### Commands
**/getmusicplaying**
will tell you the track playing similar to the f3 menu

**/setmusicplaying** 
takes any track name as an argument and plays that track. "_" is used in place of any spaces that would be in a track name.
